policy_human_readable:
Entry conditions (logic: AND, all rules must be true):
  Rule 1: ema(8,).ma > price
  Rule 2: sma(8,).ma < price

Exit conditions (logic: OR, any rule can trigger):
  (none - exits driven by stop-loss and take-profit only)

Stop-loss: pct (0.005,)
Take-profit: atr_mult (1.0, 10)
